title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
summary: ServiceNow is investing $40 million in BusinessNext, an Indian banking software specialist, to expand its AI-powered financial services offerings globally. This strategic partnership positions both companies to accelerate their presence in enterprise banking technology.
content: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.

zh.title: ServiceNow投入4000万美元支持印度银行软件专家以扩展其金融服务业务
zh.summary: ServiceNow向印度银行软件专家BusinessNext投入4000万美元，以全球范围内扩展其AI驱动的金融服务产品。这一战略合作将帮助两家公司加快在企业银行技术领域的发展。

title: Orcas team up to ram sunfish until they explode
summary: Orcas have been observed working together to ram sunfish in coordinated attacks, a behavior researchers believe may help younger orcas learn to feed efficiently or serve a recreational purpose. The coordinated hunting strategy demonstrates sophisticated social learning among marine mammals.
content: “We think this may help younger orcas feed more easily, or it could also just be for fun.”

zh.title: 虎鲸集体撞击太阳鱼直到其爆炸
zh.summary: 研究人员观察到虎鲸通过协调一致的攻击方式撞击太阳鱼，这种行为可能帮助年轻虎鲸学习有效捕食或用于娱乐目的。这种协调的捕猎策略展现了海洋哺乳动物之间复杂的社会学习能力。

title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
summary: Lego's $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine designed by Carl Merriam has reportedly won approval from Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto. The working game set follows Lego's previous gaming nostalgia releases like the Game Boy and pinball machine.
content:
Carl Merriam has designed some of my favorite nostalgia-inducing Lego sets, including the Lego Nintendo Game Boy and Piranha Plant. He's assisted on the incredible Lion Knights' Castle, Galaxy Explorer, and Pirates of Barracuda Bay. 
Now, he's helped the company create a $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine set that managed to win even Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto's favor - or so he's told.
It doesn't play quite like Donkey Kong, of course. Jumpman, the character that would be renamed Mario, can never reach the top under his own power. But like Lego's $230 pinball machine, it does contain a basic fully functional game. There's a working joyst …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 乐高大金刚街机让马里奥无限跳跃——据传宫本茂很满意
zh.summary: 据报道，由卡尔·梅里亚姆设计的价值200美元的乐高大金刚街机获得了马里奥创造者宫本茂的批准。这款可工作的游戏套装延续了乐高之前的游戏怀旧产品，如Game Boy和弹球机。
